canonical_agents.note: Canonical harness-neutral agent bodies. Claude adapters are owned at runtime/harness/claude/agents/yoke-*.md (surfaced to Claude via the .claude/agents symlink) and generated from these via python3 -m yoke_core.domain.agents_render. This key is discoverability metadata only; current Codex sessions do not lazy-load these bodies from bootstrap, and the bodies are not inlined into bootstrap output.
